metadata.name: Prepare a Broker Opinion of Value (BOV)

description: A property owner wants to know the current market value of their small office building. They ask a commercial agent to prepare a BOV.

nodes.task_description: Gather information on the subject property, including its size, income, and expenses.

expected_outcome.value: Agent has all necessary data on the property being valued.

nodes.task_description: Research and select at least three recent, relevant sales comparables.

expected_outcome.value: A list of strong comparable sales is compiled.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the property using both the income approach (cap rate) and the sales comparison approach to arrive at a final value estimate.

expected_outcome.value: The agent uses multiple valuation methods to determine a credible value.

nodes.task_description: Generate a professional BOV report detailing the analysis and present it to the owner.

expected_outcome.value: The owner receives a comprehensive report explaining the property's estimated value.
